name: Live Market (order-flow engine)
description: Runs on the in-process 'market' engine instead of OASIS: agent sentiment becomes buy/sell order flow, orders move price, and price feeds back into sentiment. Deterministic under a seed, supports live news shocks (interventions) and cheap seeded ensembles for outcome distributions. No LLM calls during the run.
prompt_framing: This is a live financial-market simulation running on an order-flow engine. Agents are retail traders, institutional analysts and commentators whose sentiment translates directly into buy/sell/hold order flow. Use bullish/bearish framing; model conviction, herding and contrarian behaviour.
